hero.subtitle: Professional 2D mapping, 3D visualization, site planning and construction design for landowners, builders, developers and investors who expect more from the ground up.

about.title: A studio where survey lines become skylines.
about.description: CivilSphere Studio is a civil architecture and land development studio working across the full arc of a project — from the first contour of a raw parcel to the final keys of a finished home. We pair rigorous engineering with cinematic 3D craft so every stakeholder sees, understands and believes in the plan.

services.title: 2D Plot Mapping
services.body: Survey-accurate site plans, boundary mapping and subdivision drawings ready for approval.

services.title: 3D Plot Modeling
services.body: Photoreal 3D models of every lot, façade and street so clients see the project before a stone is laid.

services.title: Site Planning
services.body: Master plans that balance density, sunlight, circulation and the character of the land.

services.title: Land Development Layouts
services.body: Subdivision layouts engineered for yield, livability and long-term value.

services.title: Construction Drawings
services.body: Working drawings, sections and details coordinated for buildable, on-budget delivery.

services.title: Architectural Visualization
services.body: Cinematic renders, aerial flythroughs and VR walkthroughs that close the sale.

workflow.title: Site survey
workflow.body: Topographic survey, drone capture and parcel research.

workflow.title: Concept & zoning
workflow.body: Massing studies, yield analysis and code-compliance checks.

workflow.title: 3D master plan
workflow.body: Interactive 3D plan with terrain, roads, plots and landscape.

workflow.title: Construction set
workflow.body: Working drawings, schedules and tender-ready documentation.

testimonials.quote: They turned a steep, awkward parcel into our best-selling community. The 3D plan sold the project before we broke ground.
testimonials.name: Daniela Rocha

testimonials.quote: Exceptional craft. Every drawing arrived coordinated, dimensioned and buildable. Our site foreman barely had a question.
testimonials.name: Idris Khan
